underlying_goal: Run the discuss-phase and plan-phase workflows for Phase 57.3 (audit workflow infrastructure), with proper investigation of existing audit messes across projects
friction_detail: Claude initially forgot to spawn the dedicated context-checker agent from Phase 57.2, used Sonnet instead of Opus for the researcher, and produced phantom citations because research agents never persisted outputs to disk.
